Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Phoenix Song]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Phoenix Song is a technique that makes the user sound musical and their skin sing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — The Phoenix Song technique makes the user sound musical while using it, as if their skin is singing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — The Phoenix Song technique makes the user sound musical while they’re using it, like their skin is singing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Phoenix Song is a technique Yerin uses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin has a technique called Phoenix Song.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin summoned the Phoenix Song.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — The Phoenix Song was within Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Phoenix Song can strip Remnants of their will, memories, and madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — The Phoenix Song sang through Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — The Phoenix Song sang through Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — The Phoenix Song is a technique or phenomenon that reaches a crescendo.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
